subcodes.first_line: O Lord, Thou Who aidest those who seek the path of guidance, and Who illuminest the horizons with the light of dawning splendor [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا موید من اراد الی سبیل الرشاد و المجلی علی الافاق بنور الاشراق ان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @firmness in the Covenant, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
